languages.text: "В ту часть космоса можно проникнуть лишь через особые пространственные врата. Я не знаю их точных координат и как их активировать — предполагаю, что лишь высшие чины Инквизиции могут дать ответ на этот вопрос".

"That part of space can only be accessed through a special dimensional gateway. I do not know its exact coordinates or how to activate it — I assume that only the highest ranks of the Inquisition can answer this question."
languages.original_text: "В ту часть космоса можно проникнуть лишь через особые пространственные врата. Я не знаю их точных координат и как их активировать — предполагаю, что лишь высшие чины Инквизиции могут дать ответ на этот вопрос".

traits.locale_text: "That part of space can only be accessed through a special dimensional gateway. I do not know its exact coordinates or how to activate it — I assume that only the highest ranks of the Inquisition can answer this question."

"That part of space can only be accessed through a special dimensional gateway. I do not know its exact coordinates or how to activate it — I assume that only the highest ranks of the Inquisition can answer this question."

"That part of space can only be accessed through a special dimensional gateway. I do not know its exact coordinates or how to activate it — I assume that only the highest ranks of the Inquisition can answer this question."

languages.text: «Esa parte del espacio solo es accesible mediante un portal dimensional especial. No conozco las coordenadas exactas ni sé cómo activarlo. Imagino que solo los rangos más altos de la Inquisición tienen esa información».
languages.original_text: "That part of space can only be accessed through a special dimensional gateway. I do not know its exact coordinates or how to activate it — I assume that only the highest ranks of the Inquisition can answer this question."

traits.locale_text: «Esa parte del espacio solo es accesible mediante un portal dimensional especial. No conozco las coordenadas exactas ni sé cómo activarlo. Imagino que solo los rangos más altos de la Inquisición tienen esa información».

languages.text: “那片星区只能通过特殊的维度门进入。我不知道它的确切坐标，也不知道该如何激活它——我推测只有审判庭高层才知道答案。”
languages.original_text: "That part of space can only be accessed through a special dimensional gateway. I do not know its exact coordinates or how to activate it — I assume that only the highest ranks of the Inquisition can answer this question."

traits.locale_text: “那片星区只能通过特殊的维度门进入。我不知道它的确切坐标，也不知道该如何激活它——我推测只有审判庭高层才知道答案。”

languages.text: « Il n'est possible d'accéder à ce secteur de l'espace qu'en passant par un portail dimensionnel spécial. Je ne connais pas ses coordonnées exactes et j'ignore comment l'activer. Je pense que seuls les membres les plus hauts placés de l'Inquisition peuvent répondre à cette question. »
languages.original_text: "That part of space can only be accessed through a special dimensional gateway. I do not know its exact coordinates or how to activate it — I assume that only the highest ranks of the Inquisition can answer this question."

traits.locale_text: « Il n'est possible d'accéder à ce secteur de l'espace qu'en passant par un portail dimensionnel spécial. Je ne connais pas ses coordonnées exactes et j'ignore comment l'activer. Je pense que seuls les membres les plus hauts placés de l'Inquisition peuvent répondre à cette question. »

languages.text: "Uzayın o kısmına ancak özel bir boyutsal geçitten erişilebilir. Kesin koordinatlarını veya nasıl etkinleştirileceğini bilmiyorum. Bu soruyu yalnızca Engizisyon'un en üst kademelerinin cevaplayabileceğini varsayıyorum."
languages.original_text: "That part of space can only be accessed through a special dimensional gateway. I do not know its exact coordinates or how to activate it — I assume that only the highest ranks of the Inquisition can answer this question."

traits.locale_text: "Uzayın o kısmına ancak özel bir boyutsal geçitten erişilebilir. Kesin koordinatlarını veya nasıl etkinleştirileceğini bilmiyorum. Bu soruyu yalnızca Engizisyon'un en üst kademelerinin cevaplayabileceğini varsayıyorum."

languages.text: "In diesen Teil des Weltraums gelangt man nur durch ein spezielles Dimensionstor. Ich kenne weder seine exakten Koordinaten, noch weiß ich, wie man es aktiviert ... vermutlich können diese Frage nur die höchsten Vertreter der Inquisition beantworten."
languages.original_text: "That part of space can only be accessed through a special dimensional gateway. I do not know its exact coordinates or how to activate it — I assume that only the highest ranks of the Inquisition can answer this question."

traits.locale_text: "In diesen Teil des Weltraums gelangt man nur durch ein spezielles Dimensionstor. Ich kenne weder seine exakten Koordinaten, noch weiß ich, wie man es aktiviert ... vermutlich können diese Frage nur die höchsten Vertreter der Inquisition beantworten."

languages.text: 「その空間には、特別な次元ゲートウェイを通らなければアクセスできない。私はその正確な座標も起動方法も知らない。この質問に答えられるのは、異端審問官の最高位だけだろう。"
languages.original_text: "That part of space can only be accessed through a special dimensional gateway. I do not know its exact coordinates or how to activate it — I assume that only the highest ranks of the Inquisition can answer this question."
